This worked very well for covering my dish to take to the potluck. It was clingy like what I am used to but had the added bonus of being compostable!

AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.product_description: Reusable Bamboo Charcoal Sanitary Pads - Cloth Sanitary Pads - Light Incontinence Pads - Reusable Menstrual Pads Mama Pads- 6 Pack Pads, 1 Wet Bag,1 Menstrual Cup,1 Sterilization Cup with Bag (Medium)
AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.review_text: These are a decent option if you are looking for a reusable period product. They are easy to use and clean, but I do find them a bit bulky. I like that the inner lining is black so I don’t have to worry about stains.

AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.product_description: [Recle] Face Shield Replacement Film Type Set(frame1+film5) Random Color
AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.review_text: This is ok if you are only going to use it for a short time, but I would invest in something better if you are going to wear it all day every day. This item came with one set of glasses/frames that you could stick the 5 disposable shields to. It was pretty hard to get it to work. It looked like there was a groove for the shield to fit into, but I could never get it in. The adhesive was pretty lame. By the end of two hours it was coming off. So much for extra protection.

AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.product_description: Joon X Moon Bubbling Bath Fizz, (Lavender, 1 Pack), Soothing Bath Soak for Relaxation & Hydrated Skin, Shea Butter, Coconut Oil & Vitamin E for a Nourishing Bubble Bath, 9 oz
AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.review_text: This provided a nice relaxing bath. I personally prefer traditional lavender scents. This one smells more floral than lavender-y. It did bubble and fizz, which created  an inviting bath.

AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.product_description: Solpri Shield Antifungal Lemongrass Tea Tree Salt Soak for Athlete's Foot 1 lb (16 oz) (Discontinued)
AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.review_text: I was so looking forward to this foot soak, but it failed to deliver. It seems to me I may have just gotten a defective product. It is super oily/liquid-y instead of dry salt. It is almost as if the machine adding the ingredients to the bag malfunctioned and added 1 cup of oil instead of 1 tbsp. Also, it isn’t 16 oz like it says on the listing. The item I received was much lighter and smaller which also might be tied to the defective mixture. On the bright side, the scent is powerful and lovely.

AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.product_description: Nature’s Edge Q-Gel 100 Dietary Supplement, 60 softgels
AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.review_text: Great coq10. It is a higher concentration than most which is super nice. No more taking multiple pills for just one supplement.

AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.product_description: Nasopure Nasal Wash, Combo Value Refill Kit,"The Nicer Neti Pot" Sinus Wash Kit, Comfortable Nasal Rinse, 160 Salt Packets (3.75 Gram Each), Nasal Congestion, Cold, Flu, Allergy, Nasal Irrigation
AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.review_text: This is a lifetime supply of nasal relief packets. Just add them to your Neti pot with some distilled water and you are good to go! They really help if you have a sinus infection or really bad allergies.

AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.product_description: Stainless Steel Scouring Pad Set, 4 Stainless Steel Scourers with 4 Cleaning Sponges, for Dish Washing, Kitchen Cleaning, Cooking Utensil, Cookers, Tableware, Kitchenware, Household Ware (8 Packs)
AEHMQSTB6ESWFAT4AHROTV6M7VWA.review_text: This product is pretty disposable. I will work for some cleaning, but not for very long. It is pretty equivalent to a sponge from the dollar store.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: BINBOK VR Head Strap with Dual Magnetic Battery Pack for Oculus/Meta Quest 2, Twin Replaceable Battery Combo(2x8000mAh) with Magnetic Charging Dock, Adjustable Design Elite Strap VR Accessories
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text: I swear my oculus headset weighs about 50 pounds at this point with all of the extra accessories that I have on it… no but seriously every time I add accessory I just think about how heavy it’s going to be. This battery pack actually doesn’t add as much weight as some of the others I have used, which is definitely a plus. It’s also super simple to use and doesn’t take a rocket science degree to figure out. But the battery life as a good bit of time, so I don’t have any complaints!

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Beaolata Nail Polish Strips Long Lasting, 20 Nail Wraps, Nail Stickers, Gel Nail Strips, Easy Apply& Remove, Safe for Nails, Salon Quality (Rsw)
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text: This is only my second time ever using something like this so I was expecting there to be a bit of a learning curve, and there definitely is. But once you get the hang of it there isn’t much to it as long as you take your time and concentrate on what you’re doing. These I’ve had on for just under 2 weeks thus far and I only have a few that have chipped a bit on the very tips of my nails. But other than that these have lasted and I’m happy with them.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Moroccanoil Color Care Conditioner
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text: Usually I’m a fan of this brand shampoo, conditioner, and hair styling products. But unfortunately, with this conditioner, I’m just not a fan, or at least it just doesn’t really work well with my hair type. I have fine but a whole lot of near stick straight hair That’s almost sound to my lower back. And this conditioner definitely made it feel more way down and it got greasy much faster. I thought it would be a good idea to give this a try since I just got my hair highlighted, but unfortunately, it’s just too heavy for my hair. But I will say, as always it smells amazing!

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Hair Removal Device
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
This Ulike Hair Removal Device seams to be well made, it doesn’t feel cheap or flimsy at all. The issue is that it will take months of use to be able to see actual results. Being that I have only been using this for a few weeks I can’t speak as to if it works.

But I can speak to the ease of use and quality. It’s pretty simple to use and has some extra features that are not necessary, but so make it nicer to use like the cooling feature that helps the quick zap not feel as harsh. I will definitely be updating this after a few months to inform if it is in fact working. It’s definitely a commitment, but if it works it’s totally worth it.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: By Terry Hyaluronic Pressed Hydra-Powder | Transcluscent | Infused with Hyaluronic Acid | Vegan
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
I have had the opportunity to try quite a few By Terry brand products and they have been really hit or miss for me. Basically I either love them or think they are horrible. But I’m happy to say that this By Terry Hyaluronic Pressed Hydra-Powder definitely falls in the former category!

This pressed powder comes in a cute case that seams decently solid and pretty well made. The powder was securely pressed when manufacturing, so there wasn’t any loose powder rolling around inside.

As far as how well it works, I love it! The powder doesn’t kick up a whole lot, yet you still get a good bit on your brush. It doesn’t leave my face looking at all cakey or powdery, but it does take the shine away and lasts for most of the day. I do have to reapply sometimes if it’s a really long day, but not a huge deal. Would definitely recommend this and would definitely purchase in the future.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Terre De Mars Resonance Facial Oil, Certified Organic, Plumping and Nourishing Oil for Men and Women, Infused With Coffee and Evening Primrose Oil to Protect and Illuminate Skin, Perfect for All Skin Types, Made in France, Vegan and Cruelty Free (1 FL Oz)
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
I found this Terre De Mars facial oil to be just a mediocre face oil. I use Facebook oils regularly, and this one just doesn’t seam to want to soak into my skin like most do. Even if I use a very small amount it just sits on top of my skin. That being said it doesn’t feel super greasy or oily on my face which is nice.

I have combination skin and I found if I put this on my T-zone it seamed to make my face produce more oil during the day than normal. Where as on my drier areas it seamed to work much better. Overall I think if you have dry skin then you may like this particular oil. But more oily skin types may not.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: NEOGEN DERMALOGY Cica repair snail essence
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
I have heard of the benefits that snail Mucus has when used in skincare and have been wanting to give it a try for some time but jus never pulled the plug. So when I had the opportunity to try out this Neogenlab snail mucus essence I jumped on it.

So far so good. It’s definitely not the consistency that you would think it would be for something that contains a lot of snail mucus, it’s actually quite light and thin. It’s not mucus like or sticky at all and absorbs into your skin quite easily.

As far as results go, I have not seen any significant difference in my skin. It does feel nice and does not feel tacky or sticky, plus it dries down pretty fast. I have not had any trouble with using it under makeup or along with other skin care either. Overall It’s a pretty decent essence!

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Professional Hair Highlighting Combs Balayage Board, 3 Sizes Weaving Styling With Rat Tail Nylon Teasing Dyeing Combs, Coloring Board Hair Combs Accessories for DIY Salon Styling Barbershop
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text: I really don’t have any complaints about these hair highlighting combs themselves. They work great for what they are intended for and are decently sturdy. They are slightly higher in price than others I have purchased in the past, and are around the same quality. So I do think there a bit overpriced. But other than that they work great!

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: SUPRENT Razors for Men with Matrix Cutter Head, 38.5° Golden Angle Shaving Kit for Men, Travelling Razor Kit-1 Mens Razor Handle, 2 Blade Refills,1 Dock,1 Shave Foam
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
I always wondered why no companies ever made 6 bladed razors, but after using this SUPRENT I think I have an idea…

This razor looks amazingly sleek and stylish. From the blades and the curve of the handle, to the stylish holder. It oozes style and luxury. That is until you actually want to use it…

Just as they claim the handle is alloy and has a good bit of weight to it. But what they don’t tell you is that with wet, sweaty, or shaving foam covered hands this feels like a bar of soap in the shower or one of those slippery snake toys we used to have when I was growing up. The razor head is fixed in what they call an “optimum angle”, except it’s really not. Imagine trying to keep your grip on one of those slippery snakes, while trying to maneuver your hand at all kinds of odd angles to get that “optimum angle”, while 6 nice and sharp blades are around your jugular….

Unfortunately this looks great, but functionally it doesn’t perform. And to be honest that’s a shame since I have used a few different clipper sets from SUPRENT that were amazing all around. This just unfortunately isn’t one of them.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Heatless Curling Rod Headband Silk 6A 35mm with 1 Clip and 2 Silk Hair Ties No Heat Curls Overnight Curly Ribbon For Hair Tools Sleep In Curler Rollers Head Wrap for Sleeping Long Hair Wave Kit
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
I have been curious about these heartless curling rod headbands for a while now. I mean who wouldn’t love to wake up with curled and bouncy hair that you didn’t even have to use heat on?!?! So when I came across this set I figured it was totally worth a try!

I’m the set you get the shiny metallic/holographic bag, 2 scrunchies, one hair clip, and the long curling thing itself. Both the scrunchies and the curling rod thing have a satin finish, which is great for your hair and is soft to the touch. The curling rod thing seams to be stuffed with basic stuffing like you would find in a cheap pillow. Honestly the overall quality is just ok, nothing fancy.

I have used this multiple times now, and there is for sure a learning curve. It seams simple enough, but the way you wrap it, how tightly you wrap it, how big the sections are that you wrap, and how damp your hair is all play a huge rule in how it turns out. They do include a little card with pictures on the basics of how to wrap your hair, but the rest you will have to figure out as you go.

As far as how well it works, it definitely does work. Even my hair that usually doesn’t hold a curl with heat I was able to get decent wavy styles out of. This does give a nice wave to it, however if I want truly curly hair or even loose curls then this doesn’t do that for me.

One other thing worth the mentioning, I priced these out and this set is 2x-3x more expensive than others sold on here. And being that the quality on this isn’t amazing or anything. Im confused as to why. But overall it’s an ok product.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: TIANG Facial Steamer, Nano Ionic Mist Face Steamer, Hydrating Mist Sprayer Water Oxygen Injection, Nano Steamer Portable Mist Humidifier, for Face Mini Spa Rejuvenation, Moisturizing Refreshing
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
I absolutely love these types of nano facial misters and have purchased quite a few over the last 6 months or so both higher and lower end. This TIANG one is about mid level price wise, but I actually thing this works better in a lot of aspects than my more expensive one that costs about 2x the price!

My favorite facial mister prior to this was the Flight Mode Cloud Mister which is usually between $40-$50 depending on if it’s on sale or not at that time. And personally I think this TIANG one works even better!

First you can actually put an watery essence in this TIANG one, unlike the Flight mode one that doesn’t allow it. This TIANG one also has a better spray than my flight mode one. The flight mode one is insanely fine, honestly it’s actually to fine but it was still my favorite up until now. This TIANG one is slightly stronger of a spray which is enough to really mist your face without feeling like you dumping skincare or water on your skin. This TIANG one also holds a charge longer and I can easily get a day or two out of it even if I am using it frequently throughout the day.

The only real negative is the size of this TIANG one bits much larger than my old one and most of the others I have tried. But other than that this is a fantastic machine and I would highly recommend! Sometimes it’s the really simple things that work best!

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Florona Hibiscus Air Freshener Room Spray for Deep Sleep 100 ml - Pure & Unrefined Pillow Mist & Linen Spray (Hibiscus,100 ml)
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
Not really a fan of this Florona Hibiscus room freshener. First it claims to be a room and pillow spray, but it’s not, or at least this scent isn’t. It’s not relaxing at all and it’s way to strong for a pillow spray.

Generally I love hibiscus scents, but there is just something really off about this one, it’s almost perfume like. Plus the sprayer nozzle on this is terrible. It shouts out huge droplets that splatter everywhere and leak down the container and onto my hand every time. They put two different caps on this, but then the sprayer is terrible… why? Overall I was just really unimpressed by this. I have tried other products from this brand like there essential oils, and I have generally liked them. But this is just a huge miss for me.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: HiCOZY Nugget Ice Makers Countertop, Compact Crushed Ice Maker, Produce Ice in 5 Mins, 55LB Per Day, Self-Cleaning and Automatic Water Refill, Suitable for Home, Office (MBBS1/Black)
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
I have some mixed feelings when it comes to this HiCOZY Countertop Nugget Ice Maker. First and foremost this makes the best ice ever! The nuggets are small and I love that so much more than any other type of ice out there. Also the overall aesthetics are nice, this definitely has a good quality and luxe look and feel to it. Another nice feature is how fast this makes ice initially, it seriously does make enough for a few drinks in under 5 minutes.

Now for what I don’t like, and there are quite a few things unfortunately. First it’s loud, like 3x-4x louder than my previous ice maker which is definitely annoying, especially if you have company over. Next this doesn’t continuously make ice… you actually have to press the button every single time you want it to make another batch. Why? That is so inconvenient and I just don’t understand why. And that’s especially true considering the really high price point. I mean this thing is $400 and it doesn’t have a sensor to automatically shut off when the bin is full? That’s just ridiculous to me.

Unfortunately because of the issues I can only give this 3 stars. And it’s a shame too because the ice that this produces is basically my dream type of ice.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: KUMIO Stainless Steel Ice Makers Countertop, 33 Lbs in 24 Hrs, 10 Bullet Ice Ready in 6-8 Mins, Automatic Self-Cleaning, 2 Sizes of Bullet Ice for Home Kitchen Office Bar Party
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
This KUMIO Ice Maker is one of the better countertop ice makers I have tried in the last few years. We have the inground pool in the family, so all summer long we have family and friends at the house and are entertaining. So we end up going through a LOT of ice. More than both of my full size refrigerators can handle at a time.

The bullet style of ice cubes has always been up there as one of my favorites, only surpassed by the bullet ones with a full hole through the middle. And the ones this machine produces are great! There not crazy thin which is a must when using bullet style cubes since the hole in the middle already makes them melt faster than other types of ice. The machine itself is crazy easy to use and doesn’t take constant oversight to have it running for hours. And the overall quality seams great as well. Overall quite happy with this one!

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Eelectric Cooktop 30 inch, ECOTOUCH 4 Burner Radiant Electric Cooktop Built-in, 30" Stove Top Knob Control, Timer&Child Safety Lcok, 6900W, 220-240V for Hard Wire(No Plug)
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
This ECOTOUCH Electric Cooktop-30 inch- fit my counter perfectly and was super easy to install. It took me less than 20 minutes after I looked up some Utube videos. Haha.

Looks wise I really like this! It has a really sleek and more modern look to it, though the turn style buttons give it a sort of old school look. It definitely has a different layout than my previous one which was more standard with two in the front and two smaller ones in the back. But the layout actually works because it makes it easier to turn all the pot handles where I need them.

So why only 3 stars? That’s because the big main burner only works when your using only that burner, or one more burner. Once you add the 3rd and/or 4th burner it’s basically useless as it immediately cools down. I don’t understand why they designed it this way! I mean why have 4 burners if you can Only actually use 2 at a time? I honestly almost gave this 2 stars because of this, but ultimately went with 3. Not happy about that at all!

*****Update*****

The seller reached out to offer a replacement of a different model that does not have this issue. While this is very much appreciated, I’m not sure why they are still selling this one when there is a known issue with it. The 4 stars if for the replacement unit I received that does not pull energy from the big burner when using other burners. I am happy with the replacement and I am happy with the customer service of the seller.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: ecozy Portable Ice Makers Countertop, 44lbs Per Day, 24 Cubes Ready in 13 Mins, Self-Cleaning Ice Maker with Ice Bags/Ice Scoop/Ice Basket for Home Office Bar Party, Stainless Steel
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
This ecozy Portable Countertop Ice Maker is not my first countertop ice maker. We have the inground pool in our family so we end up with 10-20 people at our house nearly every single day during the summer. Our two freezer ice makers just couldn’t keep up.

As I said I have tried a few others and honestly I’m not understanding why the price point is so much higher on this than it is for others that cost half or even less. Sure this has a larger holding area for the ice, but the ice melts so fast that unless your continuously bagging it and putting it in the freezer than it doesn’t do much good. This is especially true if you do the “smaller” cubes. I have found that I need to add quite a bit of time to make the “larger” ice cubes. If not then they basically melt away when you pour a room temperature drink over them within seconds.

Sure this machine has some nice features and it does work, but I don’t see the reasoning for the price point this is listed at. My last machine was $130 and it worked just as well as this one.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Friomex Dry Ice Packs for Shipping Frozen Food - Ideal for Shipping Perishables and Chilling Drinks | Styrofoam Cooler Compatible | Includes Dry Ice Pellets | Hielo Seco
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
Maybe it’s just me but I was really confused by this product page. It it actual dry ice? Is it one of those ones you toss in the freezer? Or is it the kind that you fill up with water and then put in the freezer? Or maybe the ones you shake that activate it and it’s then cold? Honestly the description is vague and I didn’t understand it.

What I ended up getting was something I have never seen before personally, which is sheets of these cube shaped pockets with some sort of beads inside. Basically your supposed to soak it in water and then freeze it, so it’s not instant and you do have to put it in the freezer like a a few hours to a full day before it’s frozen. Once it’s frozen it does work really well to keep stuff cold and stays cold for a long time, but not any longer than most other options. Overall It does work, but I wish they would update the product page to make it more clear what it is you are actually getting…

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: The Honeywell 7 cubic feet chest freezer has an adjustable thermostat, high temperature alarm, removable storage basket, recessed door handle, and drain outlet.
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
I was pumped to receive this Honeywell 3.5 Cubic Feet Chest Freezer. My plan was to fill this with meat only so that I have room to put everything else in my other freezer.

However I’m not sure what exactly happened, but this thing is dented all over the place. And what is really weird is that the actual box was perfectly fine, not a crease or dent to be seen… it’s almost like this happened before packaging…

Obviously that’s a big issue. While it’s still usable, It’s also not ok to sell something like that. As far as how well it works, I have no complaints there at all. It keeps everything frozen and I have had no issues at all with how it runs. But come on Honeywell, when the heck happened here!?!?

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Blood Pressure Monitor by Antrolife - Automatic Upper Arm Machine & Accurate Adjustable Digital BP Cuff Kit - Largest Backlit Display - Pulse Rate Monitoring Meter - with Batteries, Bag, USB-C Cable
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
This Blood Pressure Monitor by Antrolife works as good as you could hope for an at home model to work. It gives accurate readings when compared to others I have used. The quality seams to be pretty decent and it’s easy to take your blood pressure. And the screen is nice and large so it’s easy to read even if you have poor vision.

The only complaints I have is using the other features isn’t very intuitive. Figuring out the different users and where everything is stored isn’t easy to navigate. Overall though it’s not a bad monitor.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Heatless Hair Curler For Long Hair Curls，Adjustable Heatless Curling Rod Headband, No Heat Curling Ribbon Kit You Can Sleep In Soft Cotton Curling Ribbon Overnight For Women
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
I have been using the long rod like ones of these types of overnight curl things and while I like it, I did wish I could achieve smaller curls and waves. So when I had the chance to try this Heatless Hair Curler that looks more like an octopus I was excited and hopeful.

Unfortunately I found this much more difficult and tedious to use than the ones I usually use. I used this about 8 times over the last few weeks and it takes 4x-5x longer to do than the other types do. It did give me slightly smaller waves, but honestly I don’t think the extra work is worth slightly smaller waves. Personally I think if you are using this to cut time out of your morning routine than I would pass since it takes just as long as just curling your hair would.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: ComforTrac Wave Cervical Traction Neck Support & Stretcher – Made in USA, Provides Ergonomically Correct Support for Relief of Pain, Headaches, Cervicalgia, TMJ & Spine Alignment
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
Like a lot of people these days I have developed shoulder and neck issues from working from home and staring at a computer screen all day. I have tried two other neck cushions like this one before, but this ComforTrac Wave Cervical Traction Neck Support one is definitely my favorite.

This one has a softer almost memory foam type middle that makes this much more comfortable to use than the ones without this. But it’s also more expensive than others I have, so there is that. But this does help a good bit when your having neck pain overall it’s nice and works pretty well, but it’s on the expensive side.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Electric Foot Callus Remover Kit, JAZZZNAP Rechargeable Foot File Professional Pedicure Tools with 3 Roller Heads for Dead, Hard Cracked Dry Skin, 2 Speed, Black
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text:
This JAZZZNAP Electric Foot Callus Remover Kit works just as well as any of the others I have tried before. I used to use the name brand ones, but got tired of paying like 3x-4x the price for refills that worked just as well as the generic ones.

This one does only come with 3 roller heads, though they are all different courseness’s. That’s not a word but you get the idea! I did try all 3, and while there is a slight difference it’s not crazy noticeable. You could really use each of them until there finished.

Which brings me to the issue I have with these. At the time of writing this review there are no replacements available and also no mention of what refills to buy. So that being said while it does work well I would not recommend it until that becomes available, if it ever does.

AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.product_description: Small Pill Box - 3 Compartment Travel Pill Box for Purse, Victorian Pattern Pill Container for Purse, Small Pill Case for Vitamins, Fish Oils, Capsules (Silver)
AEZUL3R34WWAORYARPTJG2X6KC5Q_1.review_text: [[VIDEOID:c88404ff4e543139357eb1b7e8c8466b]] I really wanted to like this Small Pill Box, I have been looking for a cute little pill box like this for a while. Unfortunately mine doesn’t stay closed. As you can see in the video I don’t even have to push the lever on the front to open it, it just pops right open. AHRKSR7YAA6TGQGDO6CA5GDTRXDA.product_description: RBA’s Firming Serum to Reduce Fine Lines and Wrinkles - Improve Overall Tone With Yarrow, Neem, and Spirulina - Daily Vegan Serum - 1 fl oz
AHRKSR7YAA6TGQGDO6CA5GDTRXDA.review_text:
The first thing I noticed about this product was the scent. It's a strong, earthy scent, much like I would expect from a pile of pulled-up weeds that had been sitting around for a few days. The scent lingered to the point that I've had to use scented moisturizer to cover up the smell.

For me, the texture was a bit odd considering it's dispensed through a dropper. I'm guessing that's so you get the right amount and so that you don't end up using too much. For me, though, because it's a bit thick, I felt like a bottle where I could squirt the product out would make more sense.

One good thing is that a little bit of this product does go a long way. When you squirt the product out of the dropper, you might think that it wouldn't be enough to cover your whole face. Fortunately, it is. That means that even though there is only one ounce of product in the container, it will likely last for a while.

I have dry skin. While it's not too bad during the summer, I do use moisturizers specifically for dry skin most of the winter. Yet, this felt a little greasy on my face. It was like it didn't quite seep into my skin. Even a few hours later, my face felt slightly greasy. I tried it without using a moisturizer after putting it on, and it still felt greasier than expected. I think that come winter, when my skin is really dry, this might work without feeling too greasy, but I would definitely not suggest this for anyone with oily skin.

While some people may love the smell, that combined with the greasy feeling and a price tag of $62 for an ounce, makes this a product that I would not get again or suggest to someone else.

AHRKSR7YAA6TGQGDO6CA5GDTRXDA.product_description: Foot Peel Mask Coconut - For Cracked Heels, Dead Skin Calluses - Removes & Repairs Rough Heels, Dry Feet, Make Your Feet Baby Soft - Natural Exfoliating Peeling Foot Mask 3 Pairs
AHRKSR7YAA6TGQGDO6CA5GDTRXDA.review_text:
I've used a few different foot masks before, and these have very different directions. Most tell you to put them on for 60-90 minutes. These only have you leave the foot masks on for 20-30 minutes. When we used these, we followed these directions. I'm not sure if they would have worked better if we'd left them on as long as we would with normal foot masks. Along with that, the directions say that if they aren't working as well as you'd like, you can use a new mask as soon as 4 days after the first mask. That seems really soon for me. Often, you aren't going to even begin seeing results until about four or five days after you first used the mask. Other brands suggest that you don't use another one for at least a month. That makes me think that these are not as powerful as other foot masks, which could be a good thing if you are concerned about your foot masks being too powerful.

One thing that surprised me about these masks was that there was no mention of soaking your feet daily after using the foot masks. Every other foot mask that I've used has included that in the instructions. I'm not sure how well these would work without soaking your feet since my family soaked our feet even though that was not part of the directions.

One thing that I liked about these was that they do smell really nice. They have a refreshing coconut scent. Some of the others that I've tried smell a bit chemically or like medicine. Unfortunately, I didn't feel like these worked as well as other foot masks. They are probably a 3.5-star item for me. They are less expensive than the other masks that I've tried, but they don't seem to work as well. I'd be willing to pay a little more for higher quality.

AHRKSR7YAA6TGQGDO6CA5GDTRXDA.product_description: Fiber Lash Mascara 2pcs Waterproof Dense Extra High Lash Blast Voluminous Lengthening Mascara Black, 0.54 Fl Oz
AHRKSR7YAA6TGQGDO6CA5GDTRXDA.review_text: These are really nice mascaras. They go on easily and provide nice coverage. Since they are waterproof, I was concerned that it might be difficult to wash off, but it has come off without an issue. For this price, this is definitely a good mascara option.

AHRKSR7YAA6TGQGDO6CA5GDTRXDA.product_description: Vitamin C Face Serum with Lemon Peel Bio Ferment Restorative Anti-Aging Serum with 20% Vitamin C MSM Hyaluronic Acid Organic Aloe Vera and Jojoba – 1 Ounce
AHRKSR7YAA6TGQGDO6CA5GDTRXDA.review_text:
When I first started using this, I really did not like the scent. I was expected something citrusy, but that's not the scent I got. I'm not entirely sure how to describe it, but I assume that the smell comes from the lemon peels because it's kind of a fermented, musty, fishy smell. As I've used the serum more and more, I've adjusted to the smell. It's not great, but it's not horrible either. Given a scale of 0-10, with 0 being the most disgusting thing that I've ever smelled, 10 being the most amazing thing I've ever smelled, and 5 being neutral, neither good nor bad, I'd give this about a 4.8 when it comes to smell.

Fortunately, the smell is fairly mild, and I can get past the slightly unpleasant smell because the product works well. It has made my face feel softer and smoother. I have a few dark spots on my face. After just two times using this, I noticed that they were a little lighter. With continued use, they have continued to fade.

AHSUP5RSGRWZPUEIXS3TYSDMAX5A.product_description: Everyday Beauty Renewal Night Cream Nourishing Facial Moisturizer with Brown Algae Extract, Squalene, Hyaluronic Acid and Glycerin to Moisturize and Protect Skin, Reduce Signs of Aging, 1 oz. Jar

AHSUP5RSGRWZPUEIXS3TYSDMAX5A.product_description: Everyday Beauty Strawberry Exfoliator, Nourishing, Hydrating, and Rich Antioxidant Exfoliating Scrub with Ginseng, Strawberry Seeds, and Black Currant for Dry Dehydrated, and Aging Skin, 1.7 oz. Jar
AHSUP5RSGRWZPUEIXS3TYSDMAX5A.review_text: If you love strawberries and/or are seeking a gentle scrub, this is a good choice. The sealed tub also had a plastic cover under the the lid and was boxed. The scrub had a little brown in it like what you might see when fruit starts to rot or in yogurt, but it's dated good until 9/14/2023, so I felt okay using it. The red particles made my husband and I realize we didn't confidently know the color of strawberry seeds, but I think they are. They feel kind of squishy, and the scrub feels more like a creamy moisturizing lotion. It does smell like strawberries and makes skin soft. This is a different scrub that feels gentle. I personally prefer one that feels like it's polishing and cleaning more than moisturizing though. This is currently $12.

AHSUP5RSGRWZPUEIXS3TYSDMAX5A.product_description: Everyday Beauty Radiance Cleanser, Rejuvenating Antioxidant Gel Cleanser with Rose Hip Seed Oil, Vitamin A, C, and E for All Skin Types to Soothe and Nourish Dry Damaged Skin, 4fl oz. Pump Bottle
AHSUP5RSGRWZPUEIXS3TYSDMAX5A.review_text: The bottle came in a sealed box. It's a light pink gel. The scent is nice but more fruity-rose like you might find in products scented for children. It cleans okay. I don't feel it's worth $16, but I don't think I would buy this one again regardless.

AHSUP5RSGRWZPUEIXS3TYSDMAX5A.product_description: Pineapple Gommage Peeling Gel by Vitamasques - Gentle Botanical Cellulose Exfoliator for Sensitive Skin - De-Clogs Pores & Eliminates Dead Skin - Vegan, Free from Parabens & Gluten
AHSUP5RSGRWZPUEIXS3TYSDMAX5A.review_text: The tube had a foil seal. There is a pineapple scent. You're supposed to massage the gel on dry skin for 2 minutes. As soon as you start, it starts to pill. I feel like most of it immediately dries up and falls off though I'm sure it's grabbing dead skin too. While it's gentle in that it's not using coarse particles, I didn't enjoy the dry rubbing and tugging at my skin. You can only avoid that over 2 minutes by applying a generous amount of gel, but it's a small tube. My skin looked a little brightened afterwards but not as soft and bright as many other exfoliators (scrubs, peels, masks, serums, etc). This is $12.99, which doesn't seem like as great of a value after seeing how much you need to use. I didn't like the application, results, or price enough to reorder this.
